# Kaviyarasan M — Full Stack Developer & AI Automation Engineer

Profile of Kaviyarasan M, an MCA graduate with 2+ years of experience in full-stack development, AI automation, and enterprise architecture.

## Role & Expertise
- **Core Roles**: Full Stack Developer, AI Automation Engineer, ERP/CRM Architect.
- **Location**: Tamil Nadu, India (Available Worldwide / Remote).
- **Education**: Master of Computer Applications (MCA).

## Technical Stack
- **Frontend**: Angular, React, Vue, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS.
- **Backend**: Node.js, PHP (Laravel), Python (FastAPI).
- **Databases**: MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis.
- **AI & Automation**: n8n, AI Agents, Chatbots, Workflow Automation.
- **DevOps**: Docker, AWS, Firebase, Git.

## Key Projects
- **SaaS Platforms**: Scalable enterprise solutions and cloud-native apps.
- **ERP & CRM**: Custom business management systems built for efficiency.
- **AI Integration**: Pioneering AI agent integration into traditional SaaS stacks.
